description: Grants the popup and ask webviews the live state push (deck://state via core:event listen, SPEC R-3.4), the hide-on-Esc/close-X window control (R-7.1, R-18.1), and the draggable header/title-bar region (R-14.1, R-18.2). Without this, Tauri v2's default-deny ACL blocks event.listen so the frontend never live-updates and the first-run onboarding card never renders (R-10.2).
